title: 扫码点餐
description_uz: «Hozir hamma telefon orqali buyurtma qiladimi?» — Bir do'st ikkinchisiga restoranda kod skanerlab taom buyurtma qilishni o'rgatadi. Bu suhbat taom tanlash, qadamlarni tushuntirish va savol-javobni mashq qiladi — menyuni ko'rish, buyurtmani topshirish va to'lash. Ovqat mavzusidagi amaliy so'zlarga boy. Rol o'ynash va tabiiy gapirish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Сейчас все заказывают еду через телефон?» — Один друг учит другого заказывать еду в ресторане по QR-коду. Беседа тренирует выбор блюд, объяснение шагов и вопросы-ответы — просмотр меню, отправка заказа и оплата. Богата практичной лексикой о еде. Отлично подходит для ролевой игры и естественной речи.
description_en: «Does everyone order food with their phone now?» — One friend teaches the other to scan a code and order at a restaurant. The chat practices choosing dishes, explaining steps, and asking and answering—viewing the menu, submitting the order, and paying. Rich in practical food vocabulary. Great for role-play and natural speaking.

sentences.text_original: 你想吃什么？我们点菜吧。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng chī shénme? Wǒmen diǎn cài ba.
sentences.text_translation: Nima yeging keldi? Keling, taom buyurtma qilaylik.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что ты хочешь поесть? Давай закажем.
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you want to eat? Let's order.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 等一下，我先扫一下桌子上的二维码。
sentences.pinyin: Děng yí xià, wǒ xiān sǎo yí xià zhuōzi shàng de èrwéimǎ.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz kut, avval stol ustidagi QR-kodni skanerlay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Подожди, я сначала отсканирую QR-код на столе.
sentences.text_translation_en: Hold on, let me first scan the QR code on the table.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 现在都用手机点菜了吗？
sentences.pinyin: Xiànzài dōu yòng shǒujī diǎn cài le ma?
sentences.text_translation: Hozir hamma telefon orqali buyurtma qiladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сейчас все заказывают еду через телефон?
sentences.text_translation_en: Does everyone order food with their phone now?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，很多餐厅都这样。不用等服务员，很方便。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, hěn duō cāntīng dōu zhèyàng. Búyòng děng fúwùyuán, hěn fāngbiàn.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, ko'p restoranlar shunday qiladi. Ofitsiantni kutish shart emas, juda qulay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, во многих ресторанах так. Не нужно ждать официанта, очень удобно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, lots of restaurants do this. No need to wait for a waiter — it's very convenient.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ néng kàn kan càidān ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then can I take a look at the menu?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 手机上有图片和价格，你慢慢看。
sentences.pinyin: Shǒujī shàng yǒu túpiàn hé jiàgé, nǐ mànmàn kàn.
sentences.text_translation: Telefonda rasmlar va narxlar bor, bemalol ko'raver.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В телефоне есть фото и цены, смотри не спеша.
sentences.text_translation_en: There are pictures and prices on the phone — take your time.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 这个鱼香肉丝看起来不错。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè ge yúxiāng ròusī kàn qǐlái búcuò.
sentences.text_translation: Bu yusyan uslubidagi to'g'ralgan go'sht yaxshi ko'rinyapti.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Эта свинина соломкой в соусе юйсян выглядит неплохо.
sentences.text_translation_en: This Yuxiang shredded pork looks good.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那就点这个吧。你想喝什么？
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiù diǎn zhè ge ba. Nǐ xiǎng hē shénme?
sentences.text_translation: Unda shuni buyurtma qilaylik. Nima ichmoqchisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда закажем его. Что будешь пить?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then let's order this. What do you want to drink?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yào yì bēi níngméng chá.
sentences.text_translation: Men bir piyola limonli choy olaman.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'll have a cup of lemon tea.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好。选好了，我按「提交订单」就行。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Xuǎn hǎo le, wǒ àn 'tíjiāo dìngdān' jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi. Tanlab bo'ldim, endi «buyurtmani topshirish» tugmasini bossam bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо. Выбрал, теперь просто нажму «отправить заказ».
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. I've chosen — I just press "submit order" and that's it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 这么快？不用叫服务员过来吗？
sentences.pinyin: Zhème kuài? Búyòng jiào fúwùyuán guòlái ma?
sentences.text_translation: Shunchalik tezmi? Ofitsiantni chaqirish shart emasmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Так быстро? Не нужно звать официанта?
sentences.text_translation_en: That fast? You don't need to call a waiter over?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不用。订单直接就到厨房了。
sentences.pinyin: Búyòng. Dìngdān zhíjiē jiù dào chúfáng le.
sentences.text_translation: Shart emas. Buyurtma to'g'ridan-to'g'ri oshxonaga boradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не нужно. Заказ сразу попадает на кухню.
sentences.text_translation_en: No need. The order goes straight to the kitchen.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 吃完以后直接在手机上付，不用去柜台。
sentences.pinyin: Chī wán yǐhòu zhíjiē zài shǒujī shàng fù, búyòng qù guìtái.
sentences.text_translation: Yeb bo'lgach to'g'ridan-to'g'ri telefonda to'laysan, kassaga borish shart emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: После еды платишь прямо в телефоне, к кассе идти не нужно.
sentences.text_translation_en: After eating, you pay directly on your phone — no need to go to the counter.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 太方便了！我以前都没试过。
sentences.pinyin: Tài fāngbiàn le! Wǒ yǐqián dōu méi shì guo.
sentences.text_translation: Juda qulay ekan! Men avval bunday qilib ko'rmagandim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как удобно! Я раньше так и не пробовал.
sentences.text_translation_en: So convenient! I've never tried this before.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那你以后可以多试试。现在很多店都这样。
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ yǐhòu kěyǐ duō shì shi. Xiànzài hěn duō diàn dōu zhèyàng.
sentences.text_translation: Unda bundan keyin ko'proq sinab ko'r. Hozir ko'p joylar shunday qiladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда впредь почаще пробуй. Сейчас многие заведения так делают.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then you can try it more from now on. Lots of places do this now.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好的，我学会了。下次出来吃饭，我来点。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ xuéhuì le. Xià cì chūlái chīfàn, wǒ lái diǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, o'rganib oldim. Keyingi safar ovqatga chiqqanimizda men buyurtma qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, я научился. В следующий раз, когда выйдем поесть, заказываю я.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I've learned it. Next time we eat out, I'll do the ordering.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 哈哈，好啊！那今天这顿算你的。
sentences.pinyin: Hāhā, hǎo a! Nà jīntiān zhè dùn suàn nǐ de.
sentences.text_translation: Haha, yaxshi! Unda bugungi ovqat sening hisobingdan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ха-ха, отлично! Тогда сегодняшний обед за твой счёт.
sentences.text_translation_en: Haha, sure! Then today's meal is on you.
sentences.speaker: B
